bank_defaults.cash_advance: Effective 15th June 2026: 2.5% or INR 650 whichever is higher (prior to 15th June 2026: 2.5% or INR 500 whichever is higher). Waived for YES Private and AI Inside Credit Card; not applicable for any Virtual Credit Card
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: Up to INR 500 current outstanding (statement balance + unbilled): No late payment charges. Above INR 500: 10% of statement balance or INR 1350 whichever is lower, per statement. Waived for YES Private credit card
bank_defaults.source_section: Forex/DCC per-card table from Section A.3.q 'Charges pertaining to Foreign Currency' p.17 (Foreign currency conversion charges Effective 15th June 2026 column); finance charges from Section A.2 'Finance Charges (Interest)' p.4 (3.99%/47.88% Other cards, 2.49%/29.88% FD-linked & NRI variants, 2.99%/35.88% YES Private/Prime/Marquee/Reserv); cash advance from Section A.3.a p.6; late fee from Section A.3.b p.6; interest free period from Section A.2 'Interest Free period' p.5
